title: rubus muridens
intro: Rubus muridens, also known as the murid raspberry, is a species of thorny raspberry native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus muridens include improving cardiovascular health, boosting the immune system, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried powder for consumption, and its leaves and roots can also be used to make infusions and decoctions.
